sentence: 公司正在制订新的员工培训计划。
pinyin: Gōngsī zhèngzài zhìdìng xīn de yuángōng péixùn jìhuà.
english: The company is formulating a new employee training plan.

sentence: 晚间新闻在八点准时播出。
pinyin: Wǎnjiān xīnwén zài bā diǎn zhǔnshí bōchū.
english: The evening news airs punctually at eight o'clock.

sentence: 会计师正在对公司账目进行审计。
pinyin: Kuàijìshī zhèngzài duì gōngsī zhàngmù jìnxíng shěnjì.
english: The accountant is auditing the company's financial accounts.

sentence: 二战期间，法西斯主义席卷了欧洲。
pinyin: Èr zhàn qījiān, fǎxīsī zhǔyì xíjuǎn le Ōuzhōu.
english: During World War II, fascism swept across Europe.

meaning: 1. credentials (of a diplomat); 2. documents exchanged between nations
sentence: 大使向总统递交了国书。
pinyin: Dàshǐ xiàng zǒngtǒng dìjiāo le guóshū.
english: The ambassador presented his credentials to the president.

sentence: 「桌子」是一个名词。
pinyin: 「Zhuōzi」 shì yī gè míngcí.
english: "Table" is a noun.

sentence: 孩子的注意力很难集中超过二十分钟。
pinyin: Háizi de zhùyìlì hěn nán jízhōng chāoguò èrshí fēnzhōng.
english: It is hard for children to maintain attention for more than twenty minutes.

sentence: 气象局发出了暴雨预警。
pinyin: Qìxiàngjú fāchū le bàoyǔ yùjǐng.
english: The meteorological bureau issued a heavy rain warning.

sentence: 市长下午召开了记者会。
pinyin: Shìzhǎng xiàwǔ zhàokāi le jìzhě huì.
english: The mayor held a press conference in the afternoon.

sentence: 这份报告按国别列出了各地的销售数据。
pinyin: Zhè fèn bàogào àn guó bié lièchū le gè dì de xiāoshòu shùjù.
english: This report lists the sales figures by country.

meaning: assistance to the poor; poverty alleviation
sentence: 村里的扶贫项目帮很多家庭改善了生活。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ de fú pín xiàngmù bāng hěn duō jiātíng gǎishàn le shēnghuó.
english: The village poverty-alleviation program helped many families improve their lives.

meaning: allegation; assertation; to declare; to state
sentence: 他在会议上陈述了自己的观点。
pinyin: Tā zài huìyì shàng chénshù le zìjǐ de guāndiǎn.
english: He stated his views at the meeting.

sentence: 公司里有几位外籍员工。
pinyin: Gōng sī lǐ yǒu jǐ wèi wài jí yuán gōng.
english: There are a few foreign employees in the company.

meaning: 1. gramophone record; 2. LP; 3. music CD; 4. musical album; 5. CL:張|张[
sentence: 她最近出了一张新唱片，销量很好。
pinyin: Tā zuìjìn chūle yì zhāng xīn chàngpiàn, xiāoliàng hěn hǎo.
english: She recently released a new album that's been selling very well.

meaning: 1. to select on the basis of a vote or consensus
sentence: 学校正在评选本月的优秀学生。
pinyin: Xuéxiào zhèngzài píng xuǎn běn yuè de yōuxiù xuésheng.
english: The school is selecting the outstanding student of the month.

sentence: 夏天用电高峰期常常出现电力短缺。
pinyin: Xiàtiān yòngdiàn gāofēngqī chángcháng chūxiàn diànlì duǎnquē.
english: Power shortages often occur during summer peak electricity demand.

sentence: 他学的是刑法，毕业后想当律师。
pinyin: Tā xué de shì xíngfǎ, bìyè hòu xiǎng dāng lǜshī.
english: He studied criminal law and wants to become a lawyer after graduating.

sentence: 坐高铁从北京到上海只要四个多小时。
pinyin: Zuò gāotiě cóng Běijīng dào Shànghǎi zhǐyào sì gè duō xiǎoshí.
english: Taking the high-speed rail from Beijing to Shanghai takes just over four hours.

sentence: 遇到困难时要保持理智，冷静分析。
pinyin: Yù dào kùnnán shí yào bǎochí lǐzhì, lěngjìng fēnxī.
english: When facing difficulties, stay rational and analyze calmly.

meaning: 1. omnibus; 2. complete works (of a writer or artist)
sentence: 我买了鲁迅全集，放在书架上。
pinyin: Wǒ mǎi le Lǔ Xùn quánjí, fàng zài shūjià shàng.
english: I bought the complete works of Lu Xun and placed them on the bookshelf.

sentence: 这是真真发生过的事，不是故事。
pinyin: Zhè shì zhēnzhēn fāshēng guò de shì, bú shì gùshi.
english: This is something that really and truly happened, not a story.

meaning: key point; crux; (finance) basis point, abbr. to 基點|基点[ji1 dian3]
sentence: 利率下调了五十个基本点，贷款压力小多了。
pinyin: Lìlǜ xiàtiáo le wǔshí gè jīběndiǎn, dàikuǎn yālì xiǎo duō le.
english: The interest rate was cut by fifty basis points, so the loan burden is much lighter.

sentence: 博物馆里陈列着一艘退役潜艇。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ chénliè zhe yī sōu tuìyì qiántǐng.
english: A retired submarine is on display at the museum.

sentence: 他们在郊区买了一栋别墅。
pinyin: Tāmen zài jiāoqū mǎi le yī dòng biéshù.
english: They bought a villa in the suburbs.

meaning: so as not to; in order to avoid; lest
sentence: 出门带把伞，以免被雨淋湿。
pinyin: Chūmén dài bǎ sǎn, yǐ miǎn bèi yǔ lín shī.
english: Take an umbrella when you go out so you don't get soaked by the rain.

sentence: 公司每个季度都会发一次奖金。
pinyin: Gōng sī měi gè jì dù dōu huì fā yī cì jiǎng jīn.
english: The company pays out bonuses every quarter.

sentence: 学校每季度出版一本学术刊物。
pinyin: Xuéxiào měi jìdù chūbǎn yī běn xuéshù kānwù.
english: The school publishes an academic journal every quarter.

sentence: 他在一家律师事务所实习。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā lǜshī shì wù suǒ shíxí.
english: He is doing an internship at a law firm.

sentence: 马路两侧种满了高大的梧桐树。
pinyin: Mǎlù liǎng cè zhòng mǎn le gāodà de wútóng shù.
english: Both sides of the road are lined with tall plane trees.

sentence: 你用什么浏览器上网？
pinyin: Nǐ yòng shén me liú lǎn qì shàng wǎng?
english: What browser do you use to surf the internet?

meaning: 1. to refer to; 2. see also; 3. compare (cf.); 4. to pay respect to
sentence: 详细规定参见第三章第五条。
pinyin: Xiángxì guīdìng cān jiàn dì sān zhāng dì wǔ tiáo.
english: For detailed rules, see Chapter 3, Article 5.

meaning: 1. to attend a lecture; 2. to listen to a talk
sentence: 上课时认真听讲，比课后复习还重要。
pinyin: Shàngkè shí rènzhēn tīngjiǎng, bǐ kèhòu fùxí hái zhòngyào.
english: Paying close attention in class is even more important than reviewing afterward.

sentence: 他批评这些官僚做事太拖拉。
pinyin: Tā pīpíng zhèxiē guānliáo zuòshì tài tuōla.
english: He criticized these bureaucrats for being too slow to act.

meaning: 1. start of month; 2. early in the month
sentence: 房租一般在月初的时候缴。
pinyin: Fáng zū yī bān zài yuè chū de shí hou jiǎo.
english: Rent is usually paid at the beginning of the month.

meaning: to take the blame (for sb else)
sentence: 他替朋友受过，被老板骂了一顿。
pinyin: Tā tì péng yǒu shòu guò, bèi lǎo bǎn mà le yī dùn.
english: He took the blame for his friend and got scolded by the boss.

meaning: to welcome (a visitor or newcomer); (fig.) to usher in
sentence: 学校迎来了一批新生。
pinyin: Xuéxiào yínglái le yī pī xīnshēng.
english: The school welcomed a new group of students.

sentence: 附近有一个免费停车场，很方便。
pinyin: Fùjìn yǒu yī gè miǎnfèi tíngchēchǎng, hěn fāngbiàn.
english: There is a free parking lot nearby, which is very convenient.

sentence: 他工作到午夜才回家休息。
pinyin: Tā gōngzuò dào wǔyè cái huíjiā xiūxi.
english: He worked until midnight before going home to rest.

meaning: 1. to appeal; 2. to demand (an answer); 3. requirement; 4. demand; 5.
sentence: 员工提出了加薪的诉求。
pinyin: Yuángōng tíchū le jiāxīn de sùqiú.
english: Employees put forward a demand for a pay raise.

sentence: 收音机每整点都会自动报时。
pinyin: Shōuyīnjī měi zhěngdiǎn dōu huì zìdòng bàoshí.
english: The radio automatically gives the time at every hour.

sentence: 很多商家在节假日打折促销。
pinyin: Hěn duō shāngjiā zài jiéjiàrì dǎzhé cùxiāo.
english: Many merchants offer discounts during holidays.

meaning: 1. to interview (a particular person or on a particular topic); 2. spe
sentence: 记者对他进行了一次专访。
pinyin: Jìzhě duì tā jìnxíng le yī cì zhuān fǎng.
english: The reporter conducted an exclusive interview with him.

sentence: 他喝多了就喜欢生事，邻居都烦他。
pinyin: Tā hē duō le jiù xǐhuān shēng shì, línjū dōu fán tā.
english: When he's had too much to drink, he likes to make trouble — all the neighbors find him annoying.

sentence: 笔记本电脑的电源线断了。
pinyin: Bǐjìběn diànnǎo de diànyuán xiàn duàn le.
english: The power cable for the laptop is broken.

sentence: 银行暂时冻结了他的账户。
pinyin: Yínháng zànshí dòngjié le tā de zhànghù.
english: The bank temporarily froze his account.

sentence: 老师希望学生多给一些反馈。
pinyin: Lǎoshī xīwàng xuésheng duō gěi yīxiē fǎnkuì.
english: The teacher hopes students will give more feedback.

sentence: 他通过租赁的方式使用了这台设备。
pinyin: Tā tōngguò zūlìn de fāngshì shǐyòng le zhè tái shèbèi.
english: He used this equipment through a leasing arrangement.

sentence: 这个商标被仿冒，公司正在维权。
pinyin: Zhège shāngbiāo bèi fǎngmào, gōngsī zhèngzài wéiquán.
english: This trademark is being counterfeited, and the company is taking legal action.

sentence: 他的父亲在煤矿工作了三十年。
pinyin: Tā de fùqīn zài méikuàng gōngzuò le sānshí nián.
english: His father worked in a coal mine for thirty years.

sentence: 考前这周安排了密集的复习课。
pinyin: Kǎo qián zhè zhōu ānpáile mìjí de fùxí kè.
english: This week before the exam, intensive review classes were scheduled.
